revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-1-870

Deviation of the direction of propagation of a radiation, determined by the wave nature of radiation and occurring when the radiation passes the edge of an obstruction.

Reference: C.I.E.

{{IALAFooter}}
